analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author met former Afghan President Hamid Karzai and states that China will continue to play a constructive role in the next stages of the Afghan peace process. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—portrays China as constructive and supportive in an international peace process, aligning with cooperation, security, and multilateralism themes. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is foreign policy. CH5 (CCP government succeeds domestically/technologically): Not addressed. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
